enabled.markdownDescription:
Enable/disable stdin input

Specifies whether to read event data from the stdin pipe (Accepts boolean or string with $= prefix for runtime evaluation) (Default: true)

extractors.markdownDescription:
JSON / regex extractor names

Defines a list of JSON/regex extractor names to capture events from 'inputFilePath' to transform into TenXObjects. Each item in the list should map to an extractor defined via a configuration file or startup arguments group. To learn more see: [extractors](https://doc.log10x.com/run/input/extract).

sourcePattern.markdownDescription:
Event source capture regex pattern

Defines a regex pattern to capture 'source' values for each transformed TenXObject. Tags provide a method for sequencing TenXObjects read from this input value in separate logical queues. For example, capturing a 'host' or 'fileName' value as a 'source' creates a separate logical queue for  each unique file/host origin by which TenXObjects read from this input are aggregated and written to output. The [source](https://doc.log10x.com/api/js/#TenXObject+source) member returns each TenXObject's assigned value.
